posts.text:
BREAKING: SpaceX is planning to debut its record-setting IPO as soon as June 12th and has packed the Nasdaq as its listing venue, per Reuters.

SpaceX has accelerated its IPO timeline and ⁠is now aiming to flip its prospectus ​public as early as next Wednesday.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
